measures.title: Continuation of Benefit Charge
measures.what_it_does: Continues the fire district's benefit charge (up to 60% of its budget) for six years.
measures.cost_line: Benefit charge up to 60% of the district's operating budget.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.

measures.title: Fire Levy Lid Lift
measures.what_it_does: Lifts the city levy lid for fire service funding for two years.
measures.cost_line: An additional $0.98, to $1.87 per $1,000 of assessed value.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.

measures.title: Library Levy
measures.cost_line: Up to $1.50 per $1,000 of assessed value.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.

measures.jurisdiction: Kittitas County Fire Protection District No. 2 (Kittitas Valley Fire Rescue)
measures.title: Levy Lid Lift
measures.what_it_does: Lifts the fire district's regular levy lid.
measures.cost_line: Up to $1.50 per $1,000 of assessed value.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.
